findings.issue: Heartbeat interval of 60s is too long for mobile clients that may lose connectivity
findings.suggestion: Reduce heartbeat interval to 30s and add configurable timeout

findings.issue: In-memory channel subscriptions will not survive process restarts in multi-instance deployments
findings.suggestion: Consider using Redis pub/sub as backing store for channel subscriptions

findings.issue: No connection limit per IP address could allow resource exhaustion
findings.suggestion: Add per-IP connection limit with configurable threshold
